name.ja: <ruby>纏<rt>てん</rt></ruby><ruby>竜<rt>りゅう</rt></ruby><ruby>域<rt>いき</rt></ruby>の<ruby>探<rt>たん</rt></ruby><ruby>索<rt>さく</rt></ruby>

effect.en: Special Summon 1 Level 5 or lower Wyrm Type monster with 900 DEF from your Graveyard face-up to your field. This turn, the monster Special Summoned by this effect can be treated as 2 Tributes for the Tribute Summon of a Wyrm Type monster in Attack Position.
